name: Alma Gold Inc.
description: Alma Gold Inc. is a Bedford, Nova Scotia-based junior exploration company with two primary assets: the Karita Gold Project in northern Guinea, West Africa, and the Clarence Stream North Gold Project in southwest New Brunswick, Canada. The management team has a track record of gold discoveries in West Africa, with prior projects acquired by major producers including IAMGOLD. Alma Gold is at the early exploration stage on both properties.
